name: Darts (Time Series)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache 2.0); Unit8 project; no API costs

performance.notes: Classical models fast; deep learning models (GPU recommended) seconds to minutes per epoch

agent_readiness.notes: Comprehensive time series library combining classical and deep learning models. Unified API: fit/predict works for ARIMA, Exponential Smoothing, TFT, N-BEATS, N-HiTS, RNN. Probabilistic forecasting with prediction intervals. Anomaly detection. Backtesting framework. Covariates support (past/future). Built on PyTorch Lightning for DL models. Best all-in-one time series toolkit.

gotchas: Unified API means less optimization than specialized libraries (slower than StatsForecast for classical)
Deep learning models require GPU for practical training speed
Large package with many optional dependencies
best_when: Exploratory time series analysis comparing classical vs deep learning models
Backtesting framework for evaluating multiple forecasting strategies
Teams wanting one library for all time series tasks
avoid_when: Production scaling of many series (StatsForecast faster for classical)
Simple business forecasting (Prophet easier to use)
CPU-only environments for deep learning models
summary: Darts is a comprehensive Python time series library providing a unified API for classical models (ARIMA, ETS) and deep learning (TFT, N-BEATS, N-HiTS, RNN). Probabilistic forecasting, backtesting framework, anomaly detection, and covariate support. Built on PyTorch Lightning. Best all-in-one toolkit for exploratory time series analysis and model comparison.
